prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Pathfinder / Golarion inspired epic political fantasy world map for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant fantasy continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago, inner sea coastline, sprawling harbor cities, diverse nation-states, ancient ruins, desert regions, northern frozen highlands, jungle interiors, faction ports, adventurer trade routes, pirate coves, lost temples, wizard enclaves and island relic sites.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated political fantasy atlas, aged ink-on-parchment, hand-painted terrain relief, richly colored political borders, ornate cartographic frame, adventure expedition mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map; main continent sits off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping along the coast in a diagonal arc; islands range from tiny islets and reef belts to large island realms, crescent island chains and volcanic outcrops; include compass rose, sea routes, city icons, ruins and subtle boundary shading without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed and diverse in size and shape, with channels, lagoons, reefs, atolls, volcanic islands and broken shores; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, marshy estuaries and fragmented cliffs; show deserts, frozen wastes, jungles, forests, wetlands, high mountains, volcanic badlands and magical regions.
Avoid: uniform island grid, simple round islands, tropical-only palette, modern satellite image, board-game UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
